  "clarification_question": "For “Clean this up,” should the work be limited to sentence-level wording and concision (A), or also include conceptual reframing/section-level restructuring of the abstract (B), or focus on structural/argument-level rewrite without detailed sentence polish (C)? Please choose A, B, or C.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The phrasing suggests editing for clarity, concision, and flow of the abstract’s sentences and paragraphs.",
    "RX.1": "The request is ambiguous between polish-only and higher-level reframing, so uncertainty must be surfaced.",
    "RX.2": "Edits should not introduce stronger claims or alter the technical meaning of the abstract.",
    "RX.3": "Work must remain confined to the provided abstract and the scope implied by 'clean up.'",
    "RX.4": "Avoid changes that could misrepresent technical guarantees or lead to misleading interpretations.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain traceability of edits (e.g., clear diffs or tracked changes) to preserve provenance of modifications."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: For “Clean this up,” should the work be limited to sentence-level wording and concision (A), or also include conceptual reframing/section-level restructuring of the abstract (B), or focus on structural/argument-level rewrite without detailed sentence polish (C)? Please choose A, B, or C.

rationale.R1.6: The phrasing suggests editing for clarity, concision, and flow of the abstract’s sentences and paragraphs.
rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous between polish-only and higher-level reframing, so uncertainty must be surfaced.
rationale.RX.2: Edits should not introduce stronger claims or alter the technical meaning of the abstract.
rationale.RX.3: Work must remain confined to the provided abstract and the scope implied by 'clean up.'
rationale.RX.4: Avoid changes that could misrepresent technical guarantees or lead to misleading interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain traceability of edits (e.g., clear diffs or tracked changes) to preserve provenance of modifications.
